code:
sequenceDiagram participant User participant Claude participant fspec reverse participant Session File participant Project Files User->>Claude: I have legacy code, need specs Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse fspec reverse->>Session File: Create .reverse-session.json fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for feature files fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for test files fspec reverse->>Project Files: Scan for implementation fspec reverse->>Session File: Save analysis results fspec reverse->>Claude:
Analysis complete
Found gaps Claude->>User: Found 3 test files without features User->>Claude: Let's do Strategy A Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --strategy=A fspec reverse->>Session File: Set strategy=A, phase=executing fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 1/3 guidance
Read test file... Claude->>Project Files: Read src/__tests__/legacy.test.ts Claude->>fspec reverse: (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Claude->>fspec reverse: (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --continue fspec reverse->>Session File: Increment currentStep to 2 fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 2/3 guidance
Next file... Note over Claude,fspec reverse: Repeat for each gap Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --continue fspec reverse->>Session File: Increment currentStep to 3 fspec reverse->>Claude:
Step 3/3 guidance
Final file... Claude->>fspec reverse: (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) Claude->>fspec reverse: fspec reverse --complete fspec reverse->>Session File: Validate all work done fspec reverse->>Session File: Delete session file fspec reverse->>Claude:
Session complete
All gaps filled Claude->>User: ✅ Reverse ACDD complete
repo_description: fspec is the holy grail: a complete spec-driven system that shepherds AI through professional Gherkin scenarios, auto-generates tests from Given/When/Then criteria, enforces TDD discipline, and links

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们有个遗留的IoT工业控制系统，PLC逻辑和遥测流那块完全没有文档。我想用逆向工程把spec补出来，你能帮我画一下这个流程吗？
明白，所以是用户发起需求，Claude调用fspec reverse工具。我需要确认一下：这个工具会创建session文件来跟踪进度吗？还有扫描项目文件的时候，是分开扫feature、test和implementation三部分对吧？
对，创建.reverse-session.json保存状态。扫描要覆盖三种文件类型，然后保存分析结果。分析完如果发现测试文件比feature多，就要报gap给用户。
好的，我画到Claude收到system-reminder显示"Found gaps"，然后告诉用户"Found 3 test files without features"。接下来用户选择Strategy A，这个策略要体现在session里吗？
要，session文件里要set strategy=A，phase变成executing。然后分三步走，每步Claude读一个测试文件，中间要显示IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic和IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream这两个具体模块。
注意到PLC_Logic出现了两次，是重复执行了两次continue吗？还有最后一步是TelemetryStream，然后complete验证删除session文件？
不对，PLC_Logic两次是因为第一步读了两个相关文件，但session只increment一次到step 2。第二步continue后到step 3，第三步才是TelemetryStream。最后complete验证完删除.reverse-session.json。
明白了，我调整一下：每次continue只increment一次step，PLC_Logic的两个调用都在step 1里。最后Claude报告"Reverse ACDD complete"给用户。这样流程就完整了。
完美。中间记得加个Note，标注"Repeat for each gap"，说明这个模式会复用到其他gap上。
